TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Raimonds Vējonis = Mntucing hngkawas 1966 idas 6 jiyax 15 ka Raimonds Vējonis ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Latvia ta sayang o kiya ka Raimonds Vējonis, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 7 jiyax 8 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Raimonds Vējonis = Raimonds Vējonis (Kari: Raimonds Vējonis; kngkawas 1966 idas 6 diyax 15-) ka taxa Latvia seijicya. Kngkawas 2015-2019 psdhuwan phiyu Soto Latvia. Raimonds Vējonis mniq kngkawas 2015 idas 6 diyax 3 kcka seyngkyo soto Latvia cida wada mbiyax mangal. Raimonds Vējonis pa mnngalan qpahun qnlhangan Latvia Kwohwang Bucyo uri.
S.PHON: = ɾaimonds **ɟonis = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ɾaimonds **ɟonis ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan lat*ia ta sajaŋ o kija ka ɾaimonds **ɟonis, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. = ɾaimonds **ɟonis = ɾaimonds **ɟonis (kaɾi: ɾaimonds **ɟonis; kŋkawas **** idas * dijax **-) ka taxa lat*ia səiɟiʦja. kŋkawas ****-**** psdħuwan pħiju soto lat*ia. ɾaimonds **ɟonis mniq kŋkawas **** idas * dijax * kʦka səŋkjo soto lat*ia ʦida wada mbijax maŋal. ɾaimonds **ɟonis pa mnŋalan qpaħun qnlħaŋan lat*ia kwoħwaŋ buʦjo uɾi.
S.FORM: = Raimonds Vējonis = Mntucing hngkawas 1966 idas 6 jiyax 15 ka Raimonds Vējonis ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Latvia ta sayang o kiya ka Raimonds Vējonis, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 7 jiyax 8 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Raimonds Vējonis = Raimonds Vējonis (Kari: Raimonds Vējonis; kngkawas 1966 idas 6 diyax 15-) ka taxa Latvia seijicya. Kngkawas 2015-2019 psdhuwan phiyu Soto Latvia. Raimonds Vējonis mniq kngkawas 2015 idas 6 diyax 3 kcka seyngkyo soto Latvia cida wada mbiyax mangal. Raimonds Vējonis pa mnngalan qpahun qnlhangan Latvia Kwohwang Bucyo uri.
S.PHON: = ɾaimonds **ɟonis = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ɾaimonds **ɟonis ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan lat*ia ta sajaŋ o kija ka ɾaimonds **ɟonis, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. = ɾaimonds **ɟonis = ɾaimonds **ɟonis (kaɾi: ɾaimonds **ɟonis; kŋkawas **** idas * dijax **-) ka taxa lat*ia səiɟiʦja. kŋkawas ****-**** psdħuwan pħiju soto lat*ia. ɾaimonds **ɟonis mniq kŋkawas **** idas * dijax * kʦka səŋkjo soto lat*ia ʦida wada mbijax maŋal. ɾaimonds **ɟonis pa mnŋalan qpaħun qnlħaŋan lat*ia kwoħwaŋ buʦjo uɾi.
